item.title: FTSE 100 reacts well to Burnham’s first moves
item.summary: The FTSE 100 rose on Tuesday as investors reacted positively to the new prime minister’s decision, including the appointment of John Healey’s as chancellor and changes to household bills. London’s leading index was 0.3% at the time of writing. Stocks would have also received a bost from US markets where AI stocks recovered. “John Healey’s […] The post FTSE 100 reacts well to Burnham’s first moves appeared first on UK Investor Magazine .
